name: Sweet Onion Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the egg, vegetable oil, and milk.
2. Add the self-rising flour, rolled oats, and sugar to the wet ingredients. Stir until just combined.
3. Fold in the chopped sweet onions, grated sharp cheddar cheese, and chopped pecans.
4. Spoon the batter into buttered muffin tins.
5. Bake in a preheated oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Turn the muffins out onto wire racks to cool.
